arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the secret.

created_date.description: The date and time when the secret was created.

description.description: A user-provided description of the secret.

id.description: The unique identifier of the secret.

kms_key_id.description: The KMS key ID used to encrypt the secret.

last_changed_date.description: The date and time when the secret was last changed.

policy.description: The policy document associated with the secret.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the secret.
